reminders.title: 🔴 ADS PAUSED — Redesign intake form before restarting
reminders.message:
The Tally form (rjK752) is a conversion blocker. People click the ad and bounce at the form. Fix plan:
1. Open Tally → edit rjK752
2. Cut it to 3 questions max: Name / What's your goal in one sentence / Best email
3. Remove all multi-step qualifying questions — move them to the onboarding email
4. Add a strong CTA headline: 'Start your reset — takes 60 seconds'
5. Test the form on mobile before restarting ads
Once fixed, restart the Link Clicks campaign (£7/day).

reminders.title: Keep posting content while ads are paused
reminders.message: Ads are paused but organic growth continues. Mon/Wed/Fri FB posts still go out. Focus: build page credibility and test which content resonates before ad spend resumes. High engagement posts (>50 reach or >5 likes) will be the ones to boost first.
reminders.description: Ads are paused but organic growth continues. Mon/Wed/Fri FB posts still go out. Focus: build page credibility and test which content resonates before ad spend resumes. High engagement posts (>50 reach or >5 likes) will be the ones to boost first.

reminders.title: Review what the form should actually ask
reminders.message:
Before rebuilding the form, decide: what's the minimum info needed to qualify and onboard a lead?
Suggested: Name + Email + 'What's your biggest obstacle right now?' (dropdown: time / motivation / knowledge / accountability)
Everything else (equipment, schedule, health history) → captured in the Week 1 onboarding email questionnaire.
The form's only job is to get them to pay. Keep it that way.

reminders.title: Upload 5 photos to Google Business Profile
reminders.description: Needed: before/after transformation photo, outdoor walk photo, workout photo, website screenshot or logo card, and a testimonial quote card. Go to business.google.com → Photos. GBP setup checklist linked below.

reminders.title: Paste this week's GBP post into Google Business Profile
reminders.description: Two posts drafted for this week and next — paste-ready. Open the link, hit Copy, paste into business.google.com → Posts → Add update.

reminders.title: Apply for Meta Standard Access
reminders.description: Full API campaign creation is blocked until Meta approves Standard Access for the Battleship-Reset app. Go to developers.facebook.com → Your App → App Review → Request Standard Access for ads_management. Requires business verification.

reminders.title: Top up Meta ad account — ~£10 remaining
reminders.description: Ad account balance is approximately £10. Tally quiz campaign is running at £10/day. Top up via adsmanager.facebook.com → Billing → Add funds. Recommend £50 minimum to keep campaigns running for 5+ days.

reminders.title: Green light an idea from the ideas bank (3 waiting)
reminders.description: Drafts: The Real Midlife Crisis, Life After Ozempic, The Simple Plan. Reply on Telegram or visit Business Manager.

reminders.title: Direction review needed — 3 posts with zero engagement
reminders.description: Recent posts are getting no traction. Consider: different hook, different time, different format, or pivot the arc phase. Discuss with Claude on Telegram.

reminders.title: Create statement graphic for: Life After Ozempic
Green light an idea from the ideas bank (1 waiting)
reminders.description: Drafts: The Fitness Industry Lied To You About What Men Over 40 Actually Need. Reply on Telegram or visit Business Manager.

reminders.title: Create statement graphic for: 2 stone gone. No diet plan. No PT. Just walking.
reminders.description: The Marketing Bot needs an on-brand statement image (text on background) to accompany this idea. Suggested formats: bold quote on dark background, stat/headline card, or motivational statement. Drop the finished image into brand/random-snaps/ and green-light the idea again.
